Vendor Directory

Find your
supplier

Verified raw material suppliers and manufacturers — mapped to each ODOP product and district.

Are you a vendor? Get a premium listing with full contact details. Contact us →
Ramji Silk House
Silk Yarn Supplier · Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh
Premium pure mulberry silk yarn supplier serving Varanasi weavers for 40+ years. MOQ 5kg.

Zari Palace
Zari Thread Supplier · Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh
Authentic gold and silver zari thread for Banarasi weaving. Wholesale and retail.

Suresh Natural Dyes
Natural Dye Supplier · Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh
Natural and organic dyes for silk weaving. Eco-certified. Bulk supply available.

Cotton Fabric Supplier · Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh
Fine cotton and georgette fabric for chikankari embroidery. Surat imports available.

Thread & Embroidery Supplier · Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh
All types of white and coloured thread for chikankari. Wholesale prices.

Raw Material Supplier · Jaipur, Rajasthan
Quartz powder, multani mitti and raw materials for blue pottery. Only supplier in Jaipur.

Glazing & Colour Supplier · Jaipur, Rajasthan
Cobalt and oxide colours for blue pottery glazing. Professional grade.

Handmade paper and natural colour kits for Madhubani painting. Direct from artisan cooperatives.

Raw brass sheets and metal alloys for handicraft manufacturing. Factory direct pricing.

Chemical finishing and electroplating services for brass handicrafts. Industrial grade.

Raw materials for Kutch embroidery — fabric, mirrors and thread. Community cooperative.

Silk Yarn Supplier · Mysuru, Karnataka
State-run mulberry silk yarn supply for licensed Mysore silk weavers. Quality certified.

Kanchipuram Yarn Depot

Pure mulberry silk and gold zari for Kanjivaram weaving. Trusted by 500+ weavers.

Kullu Wool Collective
Wool Supplier · Kullu, Himachal Pradesh
Local Himalayan sheep wool from Kullu valley shepherds. Natural and undyed varieties.

Direct partnership with 3 small Darjeeling estates for fresh leaf sourcing. Season-based.
